label: Outcome verifiers & executable rewards

node.label: Outcome verifiers & executable rewards
node.definition: Outcome verifiers assign reward from machine-checkable end states such as passed tests, exact answers, simulator goals, proof kernels, or constraint satisfaction.
node.why_it_matters: They enable large-scale feedback without requiring a human to rate every sampled trajectory.
limitations: A verifier can be incomplete, gameable, or misaligned with process quality and real-world usefulness.

dependencies.rationale: Outcome verifiers & executable rewards is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Reward modeling.
Outcome verifiers & executable rewards uses Labels, targets, rewards & preferences as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Outcome verifiers & executable rewards uses Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Outcome verifiers & executable rewards uses Discrete mathematics & logic as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
